title: Eggplant Requiem
description: A rich, gooey Uruguayan dish featuring eggplants that have been caramelized and are raw-friendly, often served as a hangover cure.
instructions: Slice eggplants into rounds about 1/2 inch thick.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add sliced onion and garlic, sauté until softened.
Place eggplant slices on the onions in the skillet, skin side down. Cook for about 10 minutes until golden brown.
Reduce heat to low, pour lime juice evenly over cooked eggplants. Cover and let sit for at least 5-10 minutes for caramelization and absorption of flavors.
Serve immediately with sour cream or Greek yogurt as a spread if preferred.
